content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:5 SecureField) but review credentials are placeholders (`demo_user.txt`: "test", `demo_password.txt`: "changeme") and notes.txt is just "TBD".
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when App Review cannot sign in to reach core features, and placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme" with a "TBD" note almost guarantee that outcome. Replace them with a working demo account and write notes explaining how to log in and reach the app's main functionality before submission.
